params.name: Timetide of the Valley
params.description: This is a jar of Valley Sand. Valley Merchant has a bobby of collecting a handful of sand every time he reaches the depth of the Valley. As the sand accumulated, it surprisingly acquired the power to change the Timetide of the Valley

In Kaleido Valley, unlock Multi-Speed
